subject: CloudStack Sandbox API Credentials — Secure Exchange Request
body:
Hi Vendor Relations Team,

CloudStack has offered sandbox API credentials to support our integration testing. We need to coordinate the credential exchange with their team.

Please request that CloudStack provide the sandbox API credentials (API Key and Secret Key) through our APPROVED secure channel: the 1Password shared vault.

Credentials must NOT be shared via email. All sensitive materials should be placed in the designated 1Password vault that both teams have access to.

Please confirm receipt and coordinate the handoff at your earliest convenience.

Thank you,
Internal Communications
TechCorp
